en: He went away from there and came to his hometown, and his disciples followed him.
zh: 耶穌離開那裡，來到自己的家鄉，他的門徒跟著他。

en: And on the Sabbath he began to teach in the synagogue, and many who heard him were astonished, saying, "Where did this man get these things? What is the wisdom given to him? How are such mighty works done by his hands?
zh: 到了安息日，他開始在會堂裡教導人；很多人聽見了，都驚奇地說：“這個人從哪裡得來這一切呢？所賜給他的是怎麼樣的智慧，竟然藉著他的手行出這樣的神蹟？

en: Is not this the carpenter, the son of Mary and brother of James and Joses and Judas and Simon? And are not his sisters here with us?" And they took offense at him.
zh: 這不是那木匠嗎？不是馬利亞的兒子，雅各、約西、猶大、西門的哥哥嗎？他的妹妹們不也在我們這裡嗎？”他們就厭棄耶穌。

en: And Jesus said to them, "A prophet is not without honor, except in his hometown and among his relatives and in his own household."
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“先知除了在自己的本鄉、本族、本家之外，沒有不受人尊敬的。”

en: And he could do no mighty work there, except that he laid his hands on a few sick people and healed them.
zh: 耶穌不能在那裡行甚麼神蹟，只給幾個病人按手，醫好了他們。

en: And he marveled because of their unbelief. And he went about among the villages teaching.
zh: 對於那些人的不信，他感到詫異。 耶穌到周圍的鄉村去繼續教導人。

en: And he called the twelve and began to send them out two by two, and gave them authority over the unclean spirits.
zh: 他把十二門徒叫來，差遣他們兩個兩個地出去，賜給他們勝過污靈的權柄；

en: He charged them to take nothing for their journey except a staff- no bread, no bag, no money in their belts-
zh: 吩咐他們說：“除了手杖以外，路上甚麼都不要帶，不要帶乾糧，不要帶口袋，腰袋裡也不要帶錢，

en: but to wear sandals and not put on two tunics.
zh: 只穿一雙鞋，不要穿兩件衣服。”

en: And he said to them, "Whenever you enter a house, stay there until you depart from there.
zh: 又對他們說：“你們無論到哪裡，進了一家就住在那家，直到離開那個地方。

en: And if any place will not receive you and they will not listen to you, when you leave, shake off the dust that is on your feet as a testimony against them."
zh: 甚麼地方不接待你們，不聽你們，你們離開那地方的時候，就要把腳上的灰塵跺下去，作為反對他們的見證。”

en: So they went out and proclaimed that people should repent.
zh: 門徒就出去傳道，叫人悔改，

en: And they cast out many demons and anointed with oil many who were sick and healed them.
zh: 趕出許多鬼，用油抹了許多病人，醫好他們。

en: King Herod heard of it, for Jesus' name had become known. Some said, "John the Baptist has been raised from the dead. That is why these miraculous powers are at work in him."
zh: 當時耶穌的名聲傳揚出去，希律王也聽到了。有人說：“施洗的約翰從死人中復活了，所以他身上有行神蹟的能力。”

en: But others said, "He is Elijah." And others said, "He is a prophet, like one of the prophets of old."
zh: 又有人說：“他是以利亞。”還有人說：“他是先知，像古時先知中的一位。”

en: But when Herod heard of it, he said, "John, whom I beheaded, has been raised."
zh: 希律聽見就說：“是約翰，我砍了他的頭，他又活了！”

en: For it was Herod who had sent and seized John and bound him in prison for the sake of Herodias, his brother Philip's wife, because he had married her.
zh: 原來希律曾親自派人去捉拿約翰，把他捆鎖在監裡。他這樣作，是為了他弟弟的妻子希羅底的緣故，因為他娶了希羅底為妻，

en: For John had been saying to Herod, "It is not lawful for you to have your brother's wife."
zh: 而約翰曾對希律說：“你佔有你兄弟的妻子是不合理的。”

en: And Herodias had a grudge against him and wanted to put him to death. But she could not,
zh: 於是希羅底懷恨在心，想要殺他，只是不能。

en: for Herod feared John, knowing that he was a righteous and holy man, and he kept him safe. When he heard him, he was greatly perplexed, and yet he heard him gladly.
zh: 因為希律懼怕約翰，知道他是公義聖潔的人，就保護他。希律聽了約翰的話，就非常困擾，卻仍然喜歡聽他。

en: But an opportunity came when Herod on his birthday gave a banquet for his nobles and military commanders and the leading men of Galilee.
zh: 有一天，機會來了。在希律生日的那一天，他為大臣、千夫長和加利利的要人擺設了筵席。

en: For when Herodias's daughter came in and danced, she pleased Herod and his guests. And the king said to the girl, "Ask me for whatever you wish, and I will give it to you."
zh: 希羅底的女兒進來跳舞，使希律和在座的賓客都很開心。王就對女孩子說：“你無論想要甚麼，只管向我求，我一定給你！”

en: And he vowed to her, "Whatever you ask me, I will give you, up to half of my kingdom."
zh: 並且對她再三起誓：“你無論向我求甚麼，就是我國的一半，我也一定給你！”

en: And she went out and said to her mother, "For what should I ask?" And she said, "The head of John the Baptist."
zh: 於是她出去問母親：“我該求甚麼呢？”希羅底告訴她：“施洗的約翰的頭！”

en: And she came in immediately with haste to the king and asked, saying, "I want you to give me at once the head of John the Baptist on a platter."
zh: 她急忙到王面前，向王要求說：“願王立刻把施洗的約翰的頭放在盤子上給我！”

en: And the king was exceedingly sorry, but because of his oaths and his guests he did not want to break his word to her.
zh: 希律王非常憂愁，但是因為他的誓言和在座的賓客，就不願拒絕她。

en: And immediately the king sent an executioner with orders to bring John's head. He went and beheaded him in the prison
zh: 希律王立刻差遣一個侍衛，吩咐把約翰的頭拿來。侍衛就去了，在監裡斬了約翰的頭，

en: and brought his head on a platter and gave it to the girl, and the girl gave it to her mother.
zh: 把頭放在盤子上，拿來交給那女孩子，女孩子又交給她的母親。

en: When his disciples heard of it, they came and took his body and laid it in a tomb.
zh: 約翰的門徒聽見了，就來把他的屍體領去，安放在墳墓裡。

en: The apostles returned to Jesus and told him all that they had done and taught.
zh: 使徒們回來聚集在耶穌跟前，把他們所作和所教導的一切都報告給他聽。

en: And he said to them, "Come away by yourselves to a desolate place and rest a while." For many were coming and going, and they had no leisure even to eat.
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“來，你們自己到曠野去休息一下。”因為來往的人多，他們甚至沒有時間吃飯。

en: And they went away in the boat to a desolate place by themselves.
zh: 他們就悄悄地上了船，到曠野去了。

en: Now many saw them going and recognized them, and they ran there on foot from all the towns and got there ahead of them.
zh: 群眾看見他們走了，有許多人認出了他們，就從各城出來，跑到那裡，比他們先趕到。

en: When he went ashore he saw a great crowd, and he had compassion on them, because they were like sheep without a shepherd. And he began to teach them many things.
zh: 耶穌一下船，看見一大群人，就憐憫他們，因為他們好像羊沒有牧人一樣，就開始教導他們許多事。

en: And when it grew late, his disciples came to him and said, "This is a desolate place, and the hour is now late.
zh: 天晚了，門徒前來對他說：“這裡是曠野的地方，天已經很晚了，

en: Send them away to go into the surrounding countryside and villages and buy themselves something to eat."
zh: 請叫他們散開，好讓他們往周圍的田舍村莊去，自己買點東西吃。”

en: But he answered them, "You give them something to eat." And they said to him, "Shall we go and buy two hundred denarii worth of bread and give it to them to eat?"
zh: 耶穌回答他們：“你們給他們吃吧！”門徒說：“要我們去買兩百銀幣的餅給他們吃嗎？”

en: And he said to them, "How many loaves do you have? Go and see." And when they had found out, they said, "Five, and two fish."
zh: 耶穌說：“去看看你們有多少餅！”他們知道了，就說：“五個餅，還有兩條魚。”

en: Then he commanded them all to sit down in groups on the green grass.
zh: 耶穌吩咐他們叫大家分組坐在青草地上。

en: So they sat down in groups, by hundreds and by fifties.
zh: 他們就一排一排地坐了下來，有一百的，有五十的。

en: And taking the five loaves and the two fish he looked up to heaven and said a blessing and broke the loaves and gave them to the disciples to set before the people. And he divided the two fish among them all.
zh: 耶穌拿起這五個餅、兩條魚，望著天，祝謝了；然後把餅擘開，遞給門徒擺在群眾面前，又把兩條魚也分給群眾。

en: And they all ate and were satisfied.
zh: 大家都吃了，並且吃飽了。

en: And they took up twelve baskets full of broken pieces and of the fish.
zh: 他們把剩下的零碎撿起來，裝滿了十二個籃子，

en: And those who ate the loaves were five thousand men.
zh: 吃餅的人，男人就有五千。

en: Immediately he made his disciples get into the boat and go before him to the other side, to Bethsaida, while he dismissed the crowd.
zh: 事後耶穌立刻催門徒上船，叫他們先渡到對岸的伯賽大去，等他自己叫眾人散開。

en: And after he had taken leave of them, he went up on the mountain to pray.
zh: 他離開了他們，就上山去禱告。

en: And when evening came, the boat was out on the sea, and he was alone on the land.
zh: 到了晚上，船在海中，耶穌獨自在岸上，

en: And he saw that they were making headway painfully, for the wind was against them. And about the fourth watch of the night he came to them, walking on the sea. He meant to pass by them,
zh: 看見門徒辛辛苦苦地搖櫓，因為風不順。天快亮的時候 ，耶穌在海面上向他們走去，想要趕過他們。

en: but when they saw him walking on the sea they thought it was a ghost, and cried out,
zh: 門徒看見他在海面上走，以為是鬼怪，就喊叫起來；

en: for they all saw him and were terrified. But immediately he spoke to them and said, "Take heart; it is I. Do not be afraid."
zh: 因為他們都看見了他，非常恐懼。耶穌立刻對他們說：“放心吧！是我，不要怕。”

en: And he got into the boat with them, and the wind ceased. And they were utterly astounded,
zh: 於是上了船，和他們在一起，風就平靜了。門徒心裡十分驚奇，

en: for they did not understand about the loaves, but their hearts were hardened.
zh: 因為他們還不明白分餅這件事的意義，他們的心還是遲鈍。

en: When they had crossed over, they came to land at Gennesaret and moored to the shore.
zh: 他們渡過了海，就在革尼撒勒靠岸，

en: And when they got out of the boat, the people immediately recognized him
zh: 一下船，眾人立刻認出耶穌來，

en: and ran about the whole region and began to bring the sick people on their beds to wherever they heard he was.
zh: 就跑遍那一帶地方，把有病的人放在褥子上，聽見他在哪裡，就抬到哪裡。

en: And wherever he came, in villages, cities, or countryside, they laid the sick in the marketplaces and implored him that they might touch even the fringe of his garment. And as many as touched it were made well.
zh: 耶穌無論到甚麼地方，或村莊，或城市，或鄉野，眾人都把病人放在街上，求耶穌准他們摸他衣服的繸子，摸著的人就都好了。
